pr.title: Record:  Depth Recurrence (layers 4 and 5 repeated): val_bpb 1.1182

output.summary: Depth recurrence replays layers 4 and 5 with per-block scalars to emulate 13 virtual layers while keeping the artifact under 16MB alongside inherited TTT/SWA stack.
techniques: Depth recurrence replaying layers 4 and 5 via per-block scalars
Tied test-time training on recurrent layers
Muon optimizer with SWA and int6+lzma compression
